name: Go SRT Prefill Set
summary: Go SRT Prefill Set — a accessory for keeping your kit running.
description: The Go SRT Prefill Set is a workflow-focused accessory for the Arizer Go SRT, designed to improve efficiency in high-volume or repeat-use environments. It enables quick pre-filling of chambers, reducing preparation time and ensuring consistent operation. This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
